hero.sub: I design and build XR, 3D and generative AI prototypes — from initial scoping to live demo.

contact.title: Got a project in mind?
contact.text: Available for freelance engagements, always open to discussing a tricky implementation or a collaboration between complementary profiles.

bio: Engineer (Centrale Nantes, 2016), I have designed and built interactive experiences in innovation labs — augmented reality, virtual reality, real-time 3D, generative AI — taking on Tech Lead and Product Owner roles from scoping through to live demo.
Projects presented at international trade shows, client workshops, and science mediation platforms. What drives me: projects that are well thought out, well executed, and address a real need.
Now freelance, I explore the spaces where interactive experience makes sense — and increasingly, where digital and physical objects meet.

timeline.title: Internships
timeline.detail: Manzalab, IT-CE, Netgem, Applidium — dev, UX/UI, project management

timeline.title: Centrale Nantes
timeline.detail: Engineering degree, Computer Science · High distinction

values.title: Fablab & Making
values.desc: Active member of a community fablab. Scale modelling, 3D printing, cross-disciplinary projects.

values.title: Visual Arts
values.desc: Drawing, painting, 3D modelling. An artistic sensibility that feeds into the technical work.

values.title: Sewing & Patterns
values.desc: Self-taught for many years. Designing and making to measure — soft toys, pouches, garments — from pattern to finished piece.
